60.2 - Beneficiaries Who Are Enrolled in Part A and Part B, but Do Not 
Meet Threshold for Post-Institutional Home Health Services 
(Rev. 1, 10-01-03) 
A3-3122.1, HHA-212.3 

If beneficiaries are enrolled in Part A and Part B and are eligible for the Medicare home 
health benefit, but do not meet the three consecutive day stay requirement or the 14 day 
initiation of care
